caption: A short video clip displays a sequence of screens showcasing a Twitter post from the "African Union Political Affairs Peace and Security" account, marked with the African Union logo. The top of each screen features a "VOA 60 LEARNING ENGLISH" banner. The tweet reads, "Council decides in line w/ the relevant AU instruments(AUConstitutiveAct;AUPSC Protocol;African Charter on Democracy, Elections & Governance), to suspend the participation of #BurkinaFaso in all AU activities until the effective restoration of constitutional order in the country," and is dated "Jan 31, 2022, 8:51 AM UTC." On-screen subtitles provide a narrative overlay that evolves across the sequence: beginning with "The African Union announces on Twitter," then transitioning to "the suspension of Burkina Faso," and concluding with "one week after military members seized the government." The background remains a static, blurred gradient of green and white.
